name: writing-assistant
description: Workflow-driven writing assistant with TypeScript, Fastify, React, skills, externalized state/memory/artifacts.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @wa/core && npm run build --workspace @wa/skills && npm run build --workspace @wa/api && npm run build --workspace @wa/web
scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @wa/core && npm run build --workspace @wa/skills && npm run dev --workspace @wa/api
scripts.pretest: node scripts/check-node-version.cjs && npm run build --workspace @wa/core && npm run build --workspace @wa/skills
scripts.test: vitest run packages/core/src/workflow.test.ts packages/core/src/context.test.ts packages/core/src/llm.test.ts packages/skills/src/task-card-builder.test.ts packages/skills/src/task-card-reviser.test.ts packages/skills/src/dialogue-coordinator.test.ts packages/skills/src/outline-item-reviser.test.ts packages/skills/src/outline-reviser.test.ts packages/skills/src/outline-planner.test.ts packages/skills/src/section-writer.test.ts apps/api/src/app.test.ts
